hook.summary: High-energy sports montage and feature announcement.
hook.visual_action: The 'BET BUILDER+' logo slides in on a red background, followed by a dynamic collage of a footballer, boxer, and flying darts.

scene_flow: Intro animation of the 'BET BUILDER+' logo on a vibrant red background.
Dynamic collage of sports figures (footballer, boxer) and equipment (darts, tennis ball) appears.
Main feature text 'BET BUILDER JUST GOT BIGGER & BETTER' is displayed with descriptive subtext.
Closing brand slogan 'THAT'S LADISFACTION' appears on screen.
on_screen_text: BET BUILDER JUST GOT BIGGER & BETTER
Mix Multiple Football Fixtures & other sports with Bet Builder+
18+. Odds subject to change. Restrictions and T&Cs apply.
audience_proxy: Adult sports bettors looking for more flexibility and multi-sport options in their parlay bets.
